Interface ITerrainEdit2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members used to modify and build a terrain.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("ED9009EB-18F0-436E-9385-0F0007DD1F90")]
public interface ITerrainEdit2 : ITerrainEdit
